feedback.text: Good morning. I very much appreciate and welcome this initiative. We definitely need sound systems that allow consumers to be safe and unutilised. However, there is another point worth regulating: video games. Today, many people use video games as their main way to break away from problems, or simply a moment of breath and a break. The gaming market is growing, but the law does not sufficiently protect consumers. I and a large number of other Europeans would appreciate including video games as well as related platforms in this initiative, protecting the rights of ordinary, working consumers. Thank you.
